## 🍳 Pull Request - New Recipe

### 📋 Recipe Information

| Field | Details |
|-------|---------|
| **Recipe Name** | `Example.kt` |
| **Category** | Basics / Loops / Functions / Collections |
| **Teaches** | One main concept |

---

### ✅ Checklist

- [ ] Code compiles and runs (`kotlinc -script recipe.kt`)
- [ ] Clear comments and emojis 🍳
- [ ] "Try it yourself" or "Challenge" included
- [ ] Updated `README.md` "Recipes so far" table

---
